protocol_name: Q5 Hot Start High-Fidelity 2X Master Mix
notes: Vendor gives annealing 50–72°C and extension 20–30 s/kb. Bundle default uses 60°C / 20 s / 30 s-kb as a modeled routine short-amplicon profile; adjust per primer pair.

protocol_name: Platinum II Hot-Start PCR Master Mix (2X)
notes: Vendor routine table lists 94°C 2 min; 25–35 cycles of 94°C 15 s, 60°C 15 s, 68°C 15 s/kb, then hold at 4°C. No separate final extension shown.
Vendor gives annealing 55–68°C and 30–35 cycles. Bundle default uses midpoint 60°C and 30 cycles for deterministic equality checks.
